title: Managing Procedural Memory in LLM Agents: Control, Adaptation, and Evaluation
innovation_summary: Managing Procedural Memory in LLM Agents: Control, Adaptation, and Evaluation: We introduce AFTER, a benchmark of 382 realistic enterprise tasks spanning six professional roles and 22 procedural skills, designed to evaluate how skills transfer across tasks,.
